category_sources: Official GitHub repository at https://github.com/JetBrains/fernflower describes it as a decompiler from Java bytecode to Java.
source_facts.description says it is an advanced decompiler for Java bytecode.
display_name_sources: Official GitHub README at https://github.com/JetBrains/fernflower says the correct name is Fernflower.
docs_sources: Official repository README at https://github.com/JetBrains/fernflower contains usage, options, development, and contribution information.
repo_sources: Official GitHub page https://github.com/JetBrains/fernflower is the Homebrew homepage and describes the project.
source_facts.repo is empty, so repository was determined from the official homepage in source_facts.homepage.
tags_sources: Official GitHub topics and README at https://github.com/JetBrains/fernflower identify Java, decompiler, and reverse-engineering usage.
